name: Mirador
author: Andrew Perkis (2010) / AGP port
description: Connection game on a 27x27 grid (Abstract Games #22). Each turn fill an empty 2x2 block (a 'mirador'); miradors may never touch, except same-colour corner-to-corner. Same-colour miradors connect by corner contact or by an unobstructed one-square-wide line of sight along a shared row or column; sight to a board edge connects a mirador to that side. Link two opposite sides (either axis), then Declare - your opponent challenges with as many placements as they like: if they break the chain they win, if they cannot, you do. Pie rule.
